column4: What it does
Faceted & cultural filters (region/material/pattern) with Arabic RTL UX
Made-to-order form builder with attachments and approvals
Combine related crafts into curated sets with discounts
No-code storefront for artisans with themes & Arabic typography
AI suggests price range from comps & material/time inputs
Suggest add‑ons (care kits, frames) at cart/checkout
Registry for events + bulk corporate orders
RMA + repair requests routed to artisan with SLAs
Monthly themed craft boxes; recurring billing
Bulk/wholesale requests with negotiation chat
Build/validate IIIF Presentation manifests from assets
Hotspots, narration, guided tours; export to web
Sequence exhibits into themed tours
Calendar + publish windows for digital/physical shows
Print-ready QR/NFC labels linked to Tohfa Passport
Stamp and verify content credentials on images/videos
Lesson plans & activity packs for schools
Voice/Chat guide through exhibits (Arabic-first)
Image embeddings + pgvector to find similar crafts
Signals from material/technique/linework to hint originality
Compare styles/patterns (sadu/qatt/roshan) interactively
Arabic/English tags/captions from images
Item-to-item + user-to-item collaborative recommendations
SKU/region demand predictions for artisans
Detect counterfeit/stock anomalies/behavior flags
Policy-aware content checks (imagery/text)
Understands user goal (learn/buy/book) and routes UI
Simulate price changes impact using historical data
Per-item QR/NFC linking museum labels to product pages
Optional sensors (temp/humidity) for pottery/weaving demos
Anonymous footfall & dwell time in galleries
Tap‑in for workshop check‑ins & certificates
Cloud print for QR/NFC labels from admin
Tap/APS switch with Apple Pay + mada, fallback logic
Integrate Tabby/STC Pay/UrPay as available
Validate/standardize addresses via National Address API
Aramex/SPL rates + label generation
Structured e‑invoices & QR for KSA tax compliance
Consent records + subject access + deletion
Incident playbook & notifier to SDAIA
Batch stamp assets with content credentials
Pair novice artisans with master artisans
Micro-grants module tied to KPIs
Classroom kits + booking museum visits
Seasonal campaigns (Year of Handicrafts 2025+)
Co‑branded galleries for institutions
Cohorts, LTV, CAC, region split
Path analysis across museum → store
Flags + experiments for UX/pricing
Metrics, logs, traces, uptime & alerting
